name: CBCT Jaw
description: Cone-beam CT of the jaw for dental implant planning and pathology evaluation

sections.name: Alveolar Bone
sections.content: Alveolar bone [has adequate height and width for implant placement / no resorption / no pathology].

sections.content: Maxillary sinus [is clear / no sinusitis / no pathology].

sections.content: Mandibular canal [is intact / normal course / no pathology]. Inferior alveolar nerve is protected.

1. Normal CBCT study.
2. Adequate bone for dental implant planning.
